claim_tested: The repository owner wants TEMPO stabilized before the dependent code-video product, using three framework-first and product-second iterations.
limitations: The chat channel is not a cryptographically attested identity source
The instruction is product-direction evidence and is not implementation authorization
One owner request does not establish broader market demand

provenance.collection_method: Direct human message recorded as untrusted evidence in the active Codex task

sample_context.description: One direct repository-owner instruction in the active development task.
sample_context.population: Current TEMPO and Understand Video repository owner
